name: FASHN Virtual Try-On V1.5
description: FASHN v1.5 delivers precise virtual try-on capabilities, accurately rendering garment details like text and patterns at 576x864 resolution from both on-model and flat-lay photo references.
tagline: FASHN v1.5 delivers precise virtual try-on capabilities, accurately rendering garment details like text and patterns at 576x864 resolution from both on-model and flat-lay photo references.
